defaultScaling.label: Default scaling
defaultScaling.description: Default scaling mode for screens without custom values

defaultFps.label: Default FPS
defaultFps.description: Frame rate limit used for new screen entries

defaultNoFullscreenPause.label: Prevent fullscreen pause
defaultNoFullscreenPause.description: Prevent pausing while fullscreen apps are running

defaultFullscreenPauseOnlyActive.label: Pause only active fullscreen
defaultFullscreenPauseOnlyActive.description: Wayland only: pause only when a fullscreen window is active

defaultMuted.label: Mute by default
defaultMuted.description: Start wallpapers with silent audio by default

autoDetectWorkshop.label: Auto-detect Steam wallpaper directory
autoDetectWorkshop.description: When source folder is empty, infer workshop/content/431960 from Steam paths

autoApplyOnStartup.label: Auto apply on startup
autoApplyOnStartup.description: Automatically start engine if at least one screen has configured wallpaper
